title: DefenseClaw Scan Event Payload (v7)
description: Populates the `scan` sub-object on a gateway-event-envelope when event_type="scan". Summarises one scanner invocation — findings are fanned out as sibling EventScanFinding events sharing the same scan_id.

scan_id.description: Correlation id shared by the roll-up EventScan and all child EventScanFinding events.

target.description: File path | skill name | server URL. Redacted when scanner contract requires.

counts.description: Severity -> count. Keys are a subset of severity_max enum.

error.description: Scanner execution error. Present only when the wrapper failed (timeout, non-zero exit).
